footer.rights: © {{year}} Premium Wedding Planner Pro. All rights reserved.

landing.title: Plan Your Dream Wedding with Ease and Style
landing.subtitle: Interactive guest management, budgeting, vendors, and catering, all in one premium, intuitive system.

aboutSection.title: Who Are We?
aboutSection.text1: Wedding Planner is an exclusive software built for couples and professional wedding coordinators. We understand that planning a wedding requires attention to every single detail.
aboutSection.text2: Our platform aggregates all essential elements – timelines, wedding budgets, tasks, catering, and guest lists – into a cohesive, Premium interface.
aboutSection.why1: ✨ Elegance and Style: Beautiful user interface making planning a breeze.
aboutSection.why2: 📊 Full Budget Control: Track deposits, vendor payments, and bills.
aboutSection.why3: 👥 Online RSVP: Instant integration of guest answers with your guest list.
aboutSection.why4: 💼 For Professionals: Dedicated multi-wedding dashboard to coordinate many events at once.

servicesSection.title: Our Premium Offerings
servicesSection.subtitle: Discover the tools that will save you hundreds of hours of stress.
servicesSection.item1Text: Map milestones, create checklists, and set reminders to ensure timely delivery of wedding details.
servicesSection.item2Text: Automatic cost breakdowns, payment due reminders, and vendor invoice logging.
servicesSection.item3Text: Coordinate seating arrangements, wedding menus, allergies, and access the public RSVP portal.

gallerySection.title: Stunning Portfolios
gallerySection.subtitle: A glance at wedding styles coordinate using our planner tool.

contactSection.title: Let's Talk About Your Wedding
contactSection.subtitle: Have questions about the planner or coordinator plans? Drop us a message!
contactSection.alertSuccess: Thank you! We will reach out shortly.
